constraints.message: current_representatives must contain at least one entry (SP-007 minimum-rep cardinality).
constraints.evaluation_note: SP-007 invariant. Belt-and-braces with the schema's minItems: 1; this rule binds cross-runner conformance and gives consumers a stable rule-id to reference. The cross-record append-only obligation (a state-store write that would drain this array MUST be rejected) is consumer-side per NF-1.
